plurals.name: _2130903082_res_0x7f03002a
plurals.item: You need to confirm the time for %d food record. This is used to provide more accurate information about how your blood sugar levels are changing.
You need to confirm the times for %d food records. This is used to provide more accurate information about how your blood sugar levels are changing.

plurals.name: _2130903102_res_0x7f03003e
plurals.item: %s min of moderate to high-intensity activity
%s min of moderate to high-intensity activity

plurals.name: _2130903144_res_0x7f030068
plurals.item: You'll need a total of %d hour to recover based on your recent exercise.
You'll need a total of %d hours to recover based on your recent exercise.

plurals.name: _2130903163_res_0x7f03007b
plurals.item: %1$d blood sugar reading measurements synced. Please verify when they were taken.

plurals.name: _2130903171_res_0x7f030083
plurals.item: %1$s mi in a single run, you are a legend
%1$s mi in a single run, you are a legend

plurals.name: _2130903177_res_0x7f030089
plurals.item: You need %1$s more experience point to reach %2$s.
You need %1$s more experience points to reach %2$s.

plurals.name: _2130903180_res_0x7f03008c
plurals.item: Congratulations! You now have %1$d more point for shopping.
Congratulations! You now have %1$d more points for shopping.

plurals.name: _2130903181_res_0x7f03008d
plurals.item: Exchange amount (up to %1$d exchange per day)
Exchange amount (up to %1$d exchanges per day)

plurals.name: _2130903182_res_0x7f03008e
plurals.item: This is day %1$s of your check-in streak. You get %2$s K-point!
This is day %1$s of your check-in streak. You get %2$s K-points!

plurals.name: _2130903191_res_0x7f030097
plurals.item: You reached your step count goal %d day this month, that's the same as last month.
You reached your step count goal %d days this month, that's the same as last month.

plurals.name: _2130903192_res_0x7f030098
plurals.item: You reached your step count goal %d day this week, that's the same as last week.
You reached your step count goal %d days this week, that's the same as last week.

plurals.name: _2130903193_res_0x7f030099
plurals.item: %1$s K-point can still be exchanged today
%1$s K-points can still be exchanged today

plurals.name: _2130903194_res_0x7f03009a
plurals.item: Congratulations! You've received the %2$s medal again, No. %1$s.

plurals.name: _2130903196_res_0x7f03009c
plurals.item: You completed %1$s fitness course (%2$s – %3$s) this week.
You completed %1$s fitness courses this week.\n\nYou seem to like %2$s courses the most. %3$s was your most used course.

plurals.name: _2130903197_res_0x7f03009d
plurals.item: You completed %1$s fitness course (%2$s – %3$s) this month.
You completed %1$s fitness courses this month.\n\nYou seem to like %2$s courses the most. %3$s was your most used course.

plurals.name: IDS_pluginmotiontrack_show_three_chart
plurals.item: Up to %1$d indicator can be shown on one graph.
Up to %1$d indicators can be shown on one graph.

plurals.name: _2130903199_res_0x7f03009f
plurals.item: This service requires %1$d permission. You can revoke it at any time in Settings > Apps > Apps.
This service requires %1$d permissions. You can revoke them at any time in Settings > Apps > Apps.

plurals.name: IDS_maca_content_2_mmol
plurals.item: Your blood glucose is expected to drop below %2$s mmol/L in %1$s min. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
Your blood glucose is expected to drop below %2$s mmol/L in %1$s min. Please closely monitor your glucose level.

plurals.name: IDS_maca_content_2_mg
plurals.item: Your blood glucose is expected to drop below %2$s mg/dL in %1$s min. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
Your blood glucose is expected to drop below %2$s mg/dL in %1$s min. Please closely monitor your glucose level.

plurals.name: _2130903266_res_0x7f0300e2
plurals.item: Unable to transfer. The watch only has %1$d MB (about %2$d song) of space left. Change your selection or delete content from your watch (such as maps, music, apps, and watch faces) and try again.
Unable to transfer. The watch only has %1$d MB (about %2$d songs) of space left. Change your selection or delete content from your watch (such as maps, music, apps, and watch faces) and try again.

plurals.name: _2130903270_res_0x7f0300e6
plurals.item: A maximum of %1$d songs can be stored on the watch. Please adjust your selection and try again.

plurals.name: _2130903299_res_0x7f030103
plurals.item: Receive an alert when your heart rate rises above %1$d bpm.

plurals.name: _2130903321_res_0x7f030119
plurals.item: It's been almost %1$d week since you started. You've ran more times than %2$s of other Health runners. %3$s
It's been almost %1$d weeks since you started. You've ran more times than %2$s of other Health runners. %3$s

Exercise for another %s min to reach your Exercise goal.

Exercise for another %s min to reach your Exercise goal. Stay active!

plurals.item: %s h away from your Stand goal. Remember to get up every hour.
%s h away from your Stand goal. Remember to get up every hour.

File transfer error. %1$d files couldn't be added. Retrying…

plurals.name: _2130903449_res_0x7f030199
plurals.item: %1$s almost ready. Keep using the Health app for %2$s more day.
%1$s almost ready. Keep using the Health app for %2$s more days in a row.

plurals.item: %1$s almost ready. Keep your wearable on for %2$s more day.
%1$s almost ready. Keep your wearable on for %2$s more days in a row.

plurals.name: _2130903618_res_0x7f030242
plurals.item: Excessive exercise can lead to injury. Try not to jump more than %1$s times in a session.

plurals.name: _2130903619_res_0x7f030243
plurals.item: Excessive exercise can lead to injury. Try not to exercise for more than %1$s hours at a time.

plurals.name: _2130903626_res_0x7f03024a
plurals.item: Description must be at least %d character long. Add screenshots if possible.
Description must be at least %d characters long. Add screenshots if possible.

plurals.item: Watch for %d second to earn a reward.
Watch for %d seconds to earn a reward.

plurals.name: _2130903635_res_0x7f030253
plurals.item: You have registered for the beta test. You will be able to join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after you pass the review. The review process takes %1$d working day.
You can join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after your application passes review. This may take %1$d working day.
You have registered for the beta test. You will be able to join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after you pass the review. The review process takes %1$d working days.
You have registered for the beta test. You will be able to join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after you pass the review. The review process takes %1$d working days.
You have registered for the beta test. You will be able to join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after you pass the review. The review process takes %1$d working days.
You can join the BeiDou Satellite Messaging beta test after your application passes review. This may take %1$d working days.

plurals.name: _2130903637_res_0x7f030255
plurals.item: You've registered for the beta test. The review will take %1$d working day. You will be notified via text message after passing the review.
You've registered for the beta test, and will be notified via SMS with the results. The review takes %1$d working day.
You've registered for the beta test. The review will take %1$d working days. You will be notified via text message after passing the review.
You've registered for the beta test. The review will take %1$d working days. You will be notified via text message after passing the review.

You've registered for the beta test, and will be notified via SMS with the results. The review takes %1$d working days.
